name: Boundless Vexil - Replacement Mouthpiece
summary: As an expert in the vaping industry, you may encounter a slightly altered taste while using your Vexil device.
description: As an expert in the vaping industry, you may encounter a slightly altered taste while using your Vexil device. At this point, it is recommended to replace the mouthpiece with an official Boundless Vexil replacement. This replacement ensures optimal performance and taste. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
